name: io.github.wyattpalm2-eng/x402-seller
title: x402-seller — rug protection & safe-alpha for trading agents
description: Discover fresh token launches and rug-screen them: composite honeypot score (static analysis + live buy/sell simulation) with a liquidity-pull gate, a launch radar, and a liquidity-drain detector. EVM + Solana. Keyless, pay-per-call in USDC on Base via x402. Includes free demo tools and a public self-graded track record.
